findings.description: The source RST `使用方法` h2 section is large (well over 2000 chars plain text) and contains multiple h3 subsections (フォーマッタの設定, フォーマッタを使用する, dateTime, number, 使用例). The knowledge file merges all of these into a single `usage` section without splitting on h3 boundaries.
findings.source_evidence: RST h3 headings under 使用方法: `フォーマッタの設定`, `フォーマッタを使用する`, `dateTime`, `number`, `使用例`

findings.description: The `add-formatter` section XML config example contains class `sample.SampleFormatter` (the concrete custom formatter class used in the example), but `SampleFormatter` is absent from the hints list.
findings.source_evidence: `<component class="sample.SampleFormatter">` in the add-formatter XML example
